reviews.review_description: I'm a big fan of tap away on mobile so I was hyped on a VR version. This is just sad. The puzzles aren't satisfying at all because after every 20-40 blocks removed you get a power up that either shoots away 50-100 blocks or launch a bomb that takes out even more blocks. There is no sense of challenge or accomplishment. No skins to unlock via completions, no move limit to encourage careful clicking. It's a bare bones version of what's available on mobile. The soundtrack blows and I cannot recommend this to anyone except maybe the elderly. It's pretty bad. I regret buying it and I will probably never play it again. 2 stars because it does run very smoothly and the graphics (although simplistic) are crisp.
